raw_consumer_statement:
I was on vacation in XXXX and filling up a rental car at a gas station, the attendant took my card and charged for the gas and also made a fraudulent charge on my card. 
I have disputed discharge with Citibank and they refused to reverse the fraudulent charge and will give me no information as to their decision. 
I have attached a picture of the email I sent to Citibank, which further explains the situation and request for information.
